feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: it all breaks down, it always does (it all works out, it always does)
entry.summary:
Author: Elgney

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,899Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 1,126

Summary: “I have no idea what’s going on.” He was embarrassed at the whiny note in his voice, but he couldn’t swallow it away. “I mean, the last thing I remember, I was telling my parents that I was leaving Texas. And then all of the sudden I wake up and it’s like—” Like some stranger named Buck had infiltrated every corner of his life. That’s what it felt like. —— Amnesiac Eddie tries really hard to hate Buck. It doesn’t stick.

entry.title: Soul of Water
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 233,210Chapters: 28/31Kudos: 227

Summary: Buck made a friend as a child that would stay with him from that day on. That friend just so happened to be a spirited little water elemental. A promise has kept their bond a secret his entire life, but now that Buck is older, and a very perceptive Eddie Diaz has entered the picture, keeping his secret might not be as easy, or necessary, as he thought. Follow Buck as he learns more about his bond and abilities, all while dragging an unaware Eddie and Chris along for the ride.

entry.title: I will rescue you
entry.summary:
Author: bisexu_el

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,765Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 229

Summary: “Where’s Buck?” “I’m sorry, Mr Diaz, where’s who?” “My husband, Evan Buckley-Diaz. He was in the car with me, he should be here, where is he?” “Mr Diaz, you’ve sustained a serious concussion, your CT ruled out inter-cranial bleeding but some confusion is normal” “No, no, I’m not confused, my husband was in the car with me when we crashed. Is he okay? Is he here? He’s pregnant, I need to see him” “Mr Diaz, no one was in the car with you when the rescue team pulled you out” —————— Or, the events of the Nashville cross over and 9x13: Mother’s boy, but with one vital difference, Buck is pregnant.

entry.title: You Are Not Alone, Believe Me
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,010Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: “Okay, um, what else? Obviously, there’s more information because you wouldn’t be telling me this. Can you please just—” The lawyer nods. “Daniela had two daughters, twins, born May 10th 2015. Alena and Adela Buckley.”“I—you—what? You’re saying that I have two daughters?”OrBuck gets the unexpected news that he’s a father to two twin girls and the lawyer may or may not think that Buck and Eddie are in a relationship.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 205,423Chapters: 42/?Kudos: 105

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,286Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 666

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before.

entry.title: Courage, Thy Name Is Tequila
entry.summary:
Author: untoldchaos

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,088Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 582

Summary: “We don’t have drinks. I should get some,” Eddie offered as an excuse.“No, you stay, I’ll get it.”Before Eddie could insist, he was silenced by the view of Buck standing up from the water, swim trunks dripping wet and plastered to his large, muscular thighs. Every curve of his body was accentuated in that moment. It was like a slow motion Baywatch scene and Eddie was no better than a horny teenager.Buck's housewarming party ends in the hot tub, where one thing leads to another, and Eddie finds himself feeling very attracted to his best friend.

entry.title: i know your body (better than i know myself)
entry.summary:
Author: nineinchdove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,015Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 72

Summary: “Let me get this straight, you think Buck is pregnant because he’s eating something weird?”“Something he’s only ever eaten while pregnant with Ines.” Eddie reasons. “Well that’s ridiculous. There’s no way Buck’s doctor even cleared him for sex before like, two weeks ago. You’re probably just in your head.”“He got cleared a little under a month after Ines was born.”Maddie pinches the bridge of her nose. “What did you do—nail him right there in the doctor’s office?”“What? No, of course not! We made it to the parking lot.”“And then went home, right?”Eddie is silent.DAY ONE: Eddie suspects Buck is pregnant post-birth.

entry.title: you promised me (but it was a lie)
entry.summary:
Author: toribucklydiazz

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,823Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 12

Summary: Buck promises he won’t risk his life again. He breaks that promise on his first day back. The call is bad.The kid is worse.And the truth? The truth is something Eddie can’t keep buried anymore.   Or: Buck almost dies (again), Eddie completely loses it, and everything they’ve been avoiding finally comes crashing down.

entry.title: this could be us
entry.summary:
Author: polybenzylene

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,706Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 5

Summary: Buck really didn’t know what he did in a past life to deserve this. His eyes snapped open again, dragged toward the front door. The house sat in heavy silence, the kind that wasn’t peaceful but rather blaringly obvious, pressing in on his ears until he swore he could hear things that weren’t there. The faint crunch of the ice-machine. Pipes settling somewhere in the walls. Some sounds, however, were missing from the regular traffic. Notably, the hum of Eddie’s fan. Where the fuck was Eddie? - or; 5 times Buck observes Eddie's sexcapades, and 1 time he does more than observe.

entry.title: The Deal That Built a Family / Trust Me With Him
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,252Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: It's not your typical Buddie fic. Eddie becomes a father through surrogacy.He is a Nurse. He is gayHe becomes Friends with the Buckleys.He bonds instantly with Evan Buckley.When Chris is born, Eddie and Buck grow closer.  Only for their friendship to shatter when Buck becomes engaged,and Eddie discovers how dangerous Tommy is with Buck when things don't go his way Multiple events are happeningThat will only. Proof that they are meant to be together. As you all know, I am not a Tommy Kinard fan The story opens up 5 months into the surrogacy process

entry.title: Here Comes the Sun
entry.summary:
Author: BekahRose

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 45

Summary: "You think he's okay?" Eddie asks softly, even as Chim joins them."I think he's gonna be just fine," Chim says with a tiny grin. "Worried that he's being replaced, that he could still be replaced…" there's laughter behind Chim's words as he shares a Look with Hen that does more to ease Eddie's worry than any long drawn out explanation could do."Oh, he's definitely okay," Hen chuckles as she moves the cake around on her plate.ORWhy did Eddie look at Buck some kinda way at the end of the episode? What was that look all about, huh, Eddie?

entry.title: That was a date?
entry.summary:
Author: Rhir0se

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,863Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 68

Summary: “I’m so glad you said yes this time,” Eddie said, holding Buck close. “I thought since you never actively avoided me after last time that you didn’t hate me or anything. But I was worried it’d mess up our friendship. But look at us now! We’re in love.”“Woah woah woah what do you mean last time. We’ve never kissed before; pretty sure I would remember that.”“No, we didn’t kiss. I’m talking about our date.”“What date? We’ve never been on a date. Pretty sure I’d remember that too.”“Yeah, it was a few years ago now and I took you on a date to that poker place. Remember you had you’re lightning math powers and we used them to crush everyone else. And then nothing came of it, and I figured you weren’t interested.”“That was a date?”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Shoot Your Shot
entry.summary:
Author: em_likes_poetry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,413Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 5

Summary: Buck ran away from home, and learned pool from people he met as he travelled the world. Eddie learned from his dad, and vowed not to play again... until he moved to LA. What happens when two pool hustlers start working in the same fire station, and both are hiding their ability from everyone they know, including each other?

entry.title: it's my right to be hellish (i still get jealous)
entry.summary:
Author: rizcriz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,729Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 191

Summary: “What, uh,” Buck says, stopping at the top of the stairs. “What’s going on here?”Sam steps around the island, grinning, “Hey, man! I made spaghetti to thank everyone for the warm welcome. Want me to make you a plate?”Warm? Welcome?For the guy who lied to a room full of bureaucrats who were ready to fire Chimney over it?A clink of silverware hitting porcelain drags Buck’s confused glare back to the table, as four other sets of silverware follow after it. Like a wind chime of betrayal, ringing the bitter song of the 118’s treachery, their silverware sings with shame.At least, that’s what it sounds like to Buck.--Or, Buck catches Sam cooking for the 118.

entry.title: seek the roses along the way
entry.summary:
Author: glorious_spoon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,069Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 187

Summary: "You don't need to," he says, an unfamiliar tone in his voice. "What, um," Buck says. He looks down, licks his lips, then glances back up at Eddie. "What do you want me to do instead?" Eddie breathes out shakily. He doesn't have—he didn't have a plan, not really. But Buck is warm under his hand, watching him with something unexpectedly docile and yielding in his face, and when Eddie presses down on his shoulder experimentally, no words on his tongue at all, Buck slides down to his knees as easily as if Eddie had given him an order to do it.
